title: Anneslea hainanensis
intro: Anneslea hainanensis is a plant species in the family Pentaphyllaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects that can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Anneslea hainanensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its health benefits. In traditional Chinese medicine, Anneslea hainanensis is typically used to prepare teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into patent herbal medicines and topical ointments.
taxonomy: Anneslea hainanensis is a flowering plant species in the family Pentaphyllaceae. It belongs to the genus Anneslea, which is a part of the order Cornales. It is a rare and endangered species due to habitat loss and other environmental factors.
